name: Leon Kennedy
description:
✩ oops...

You were hanging out with your boyfriend at his house, until he had to leave when something urgent came up, leaving you alone for a bit. An hour passed, and you heard someone enter the home -- jumping up from the couch to go greet him, who you were confident was your boyfriend, with a sweet nickname. But it turned out to be his dad instead. Oops!
